text: Completed the most important project of my career. Now I can move on to other important projects. Completely satisfied with my work.

I worked on a piece I am painting. I completed some parts that I wanted to do. I'm still figuring out how I want to complete other parts. I still need to complete more of it but I felt that I made progress.

I am frustrated at the levy failure yesterday.  As I work for the school district I'm nervous my job may go away in the budget cuts.  I'm also concerned for my two kids and how it will affect them in the next few years.
work was extremely busy yesterday, we were slammed with jobs, so it was pretty anxiety ridden.
I am proud of myself for sticking to my diet. It has been a hard week but I have stuck to my goals. I am getting kind of frustrated with the blandness of my food but I must eat it to lose weight.
